name: Set up Shipping Costs per Product

If you choose carrier locations, pick a carrier (e.g. Australia Post eParcel) and select the areas that this shipping option will deliver to. Your file needs to contain these four fields:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "SKU*", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": cost"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, if you want to use the Standard Shipping method with 9.95 for the first parcel, 5.00 for subsequent parcels and a maximum charge of $20.00, it would be written as:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ABC123,standard shipping:9.95,5.00,20;", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": the CSV file you have created, then "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Map the product SKU to "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": " and map the columns containing the flat rates to the fields above, then click "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, products, you can update your listing rules templates to pass this on to eBay."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control [{"text": "Select the template, that you want to use fixed rate shipping, by selecting the "}, {"text": "ID", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab. Under "}, {"text": "Domestic Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " choose "}, {"text": "Flat", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the "}, {"text": "How Do You Charge For Shipping?", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down box. In the "}, {"text": "Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " you now have the option to select your "}, {"text": "Fixed Rate Per Product", "bold": true}, {"text": " shipping rate."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save Template & Revise Active Listings", "bold": true}, {"text": " to apply these changes to your eBay listings."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": All products on this template are required to have a shipping cost configured, otherwise they will fail to list/revise."}]}]
